Send SOL to the address below to participate in the presale, you can also scan the QR Code.

  • Copied!!!

  • How To Join In The Presale:

    Set Up A Solana Wallet (Trust Wallet Or Phantom Will Work).
    Buy $SOL From Binance Or Coinbase.
    Send $SOL From Your Personal (Not Exchange) Wallet To Get Token Airdrop.
    Once Presale Ends, Your Tokens Will be Airdropped To Your Wallet.
    Join Our Telegram or Discord if You Have Any Questions.
